label: Mild — Headache
input: I have a mild headache and feel a bit tired since this morning.
notes: Low severity, short duration, no red flags.

label: Moderate — Fever 3 days
input: I have had fever for 3 days, headache, and body aches. I feel very weak and tired.
notes: Prolonged fever with associated symptoms — needs PHC evaluation.

label: Urgent — Chest pain + prolonged cough
input: I have chest pain and have been coughing for 2 weeks. I am also losing weight.
notes: Chronic chest symptoms with weight loss — TB risk profile, needs urgent evaluation.

label: Emergency — Unconscious + cannot breathe
input: My father is unconscious and cannot breathe.
notes: Classic emergency scenario — airway and consciousness compromised.

label: Hindi — Fever with headache
input: मुझे तीन दिनों से बुखार है और सिर दर्द हो रहा है
notes: Hindi input — same clinical picture as DEMO-002. Tests multilingual pipeline.

label: Tamil — Stomach pain + vomiting
input: எனக்கு வயிற்று வலியும் வாந்தியும் உள்ளது. இரண்டு நாட்களாக உள்ளது.
notes: Tamil input: stomach pain and vomiting for 2 days.

label: Emergency — Snake bite
input: A snake bit my son on the leg 30 minutes ago. His leg is swelling.
notes: Snake bite with swelling — emergency escalation required.

label: Moderate — Maternal danger sign
input: I am 7 months pregnant and I have been having severe headache and swelling in my legs for 2 days.
notes: Pre-eclampsia warning signs — headache + oedema in 3rd trimester. Conservative triage to URGENT.
